name: cashflow-monorepo
description: Alternative Credit Scoring Platform with Federated Learning

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run client" "npm run bank-a" "npm run bank-b" "npm run backend" --names "CLIENT,BANK-A,BANK-B,BACKEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta"
scripts.install-all: cd frontend-client && npm install && cd ../frontend-bank-a && npm install && cd ../frontend-bank-b && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
